name: Kai Muro
description: Born during a Fracture event, Kai has lived his entire life without a shadow — a phenomenon no one in his village will explain. Quiet and observant, he's learned to notice what others ignore. When the Fracture begins to expand, Kai realizes his peculiarity isn't a defect. It's a door.

name: Sera Vane
tagline: Seven years hunting a myth. She found a boy.
description: A former researcher for the now-dissolved Fracture Institute, Sera has spent three years tracking the only Shadowless in recorded history. Pragmatic to the point of cruelty, she struggles to see Kai as anything other than a variable — until the Sealed Ones make it personal.

name: The Elder
tagline: He's been waiting for the right lie to stop working.
description: The village's oldest resident and Kai's de facto guardian. His warmth is genuine — and so is the secret he's kept for twelve years. The Elder knows more about the Fracture than any living person, because he was there when it first opened.

name: Director Hael
tagline: The man who decided the cost was acceptable.
description: Former head of the Fracture Institute, Hael disbanded the organization publicly and continued its most dangerous experiments in private. He believes the Void can be weaponized — and that a Shadowless child is the key.
